message:
chore(beads): close strnstr bounded absent scan slice (bd-ef934)

Closes bd-ef934 with the perf evidence captured by the prior commit
(\"perf(string): terminator-aware strnstr bounded absent scan\"):

Baseline p50 ns/op (windows-slide implementation):
  16=70.864, 64=243.467, 256=968.041, 1024=3756.605, 4096=14988.490

After p50 ns/op (single-pass terminator-aware scan):
  16=12.288, 64=41.669, 256=144.437, 1024=531.829, 4096=2100.791

Verification gates that ran clean:
- cargo fmt --check
- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- frankenlibc-core strnstr test filter
- frankenlibc-abi strnstr test filter
- git diff --check
- UBS critical=0

Tracker entry only — no code changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
